title: United States cattle inventory down 2%
summary: There were 91.9 million head of cattle and calves on U.S. farms as of Jan. 1, 2022, according to the Cattle report published today by the U.S. Department of Agriculture’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS).

title: IARC at Alaska Forum on the Environment 2022
summary: IARC is an active partner in the 2022 Alaska Forum on the Environment . For the eleventh straight year, Nancy Fresco, the network coordinator for IARC’s Scenarios Network for Alaska + Arctic Planning, organized the climate change track of the conference.
